description_long: This is a vintage, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The aircraft is painted primarily white with red accents, including red stars on the wings and tail, and a black stripe running along the fuselage. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and positioned towards the front of the fuselage, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both adorned with red markings. The landing gear is fixed in a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design suggests a classic military or aerobatic style.
description: A vintage, single-propeller airplane with a white and red color scheme, low-mounted wings, and a streamlined fuselage. It features a fixed taildragger landing gear and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, symmetrical low wings with red stars, and the streamlined nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, propeller, and detailed markings along the fuselage and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets; red star insignia on each wing.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
